description: Known error patterns and their fixes. Curated by Claude and human together.

fixes.description: Cloud Run cold start — hit the endpoint to wake it

fixes.do_command: Find and kill any duplicate bun processes running oracle-bot.ts or telegram-bot.ts that conflict with Telegram polling. Check with: ps aux | grep oracle-bot. Kill duplicates, keep one.
fixes.description: Two bot instances polling same token causes 409 Conflict

fixes.fix: cd /Users/jarkius/workspace/products/trackattendance && python3 -c "import json,sys; lines=open('ψ/pulse/events.jsonl').readlines(); valid=[l for l in lines if l.strip()]; [json.loads(l) for l in valid]; open('ψ/pulse/events.jsonl','w').writelines(valid); print(f'Cleaned: {len(lines)-len(valid)} bad lines removed')"
